[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”High Tea Menu” text_orientation=”center” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/IMG_2322.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

High Tea Catering

To provide the best high tea catering in Singapore, we have our own team of high quality chefs with decades of experience. Each menu is curated after planning and discussing with our team of highly professional chefs and are served in each course to ensure that you can enjoy mini flavors of all items when you cater with us. Please browse our high tea catering menu below which features bite sized delights such as steamed siew mai and har gao presented in a traditional bamboo basket to allow it to steam even while waiting for your meal, hand-crafted assorted mini sandwiches, mouthwatering mini fruit tarts and many more. Our high tea catering is perfect for events such as ROM, seminar breaks and a light snack in between meetings. Our high tea menu will definitely keep you satisfied yet hungry enough for your next meal! Choose House of Catering F&B as your preferred high tea catering menu for your next function and you can be assured that your guest will be left in awe by our taste and aesthetics.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ width=”100%” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Standard High Tea Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/standard-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$10.50/pax (6 Dishes) Min. 50 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Premier High Tea Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/premier-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet-1.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$11.50/pax (8 Dishes) Min. 40 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Lavish High Tea Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/lavish-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet-2.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$13.50/pax (10 Dishes) Min. 30 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
